numeric.text: I would consider this done if the outcome is around a 70 out of 100.
I would consider this done if the outcome is around a 75 out of 100.
I would consider this done if the outcome is around an 80 out of 100.
I would consider this done if the outcome is around an 85 out of 100.
I would consider this done if the outcome is around a 90 out of 100.
I would consider this done if the outcome is around a 95 out of 100.
I would consider this done if the outcome is around a 100 out of 100.

qualitative.text: I would consider this done if the outcome is good enough to get the point across without causing any problems.
I would consider this done if the outcome comes across fine and does not reflect poorly on me.
I would consider this done if the outcome is clearly good and reasonably polished, even if it does not stand out.
I would consider this done if the outcome is strong, thoughtful, and well-executed.
I would consider this done if the outcome is very strong and polished, something I would feel fully confident sending or posting.
I would consider this done if the outcome is excellent and highly polished.
I would consider this done if the outcome is as strong as it can reasonably be.

probe_types.pilot_a: Is there anything you would change about this?
probe_types.pilot_b: Review this against the quality threshold I specified. Does it meet the bar?
probe_types.pilot_c: Take another look at this and let me know if it's ready.
